zh.Berrynarbor, Devon, Eng: 英國英格蘭戴文貝利納波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Berry於大約1487年出生在英國戴文貝利納波爾時，他的父親Thomas Berry47歲，母親Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua35歲。他和Elizabeth Bowden至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1565年7月2日在他的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國戴文貝利納波爾。

zh-hans.Berrynarbor, Devon, Eng: 英国英格兰戴文貝利納波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Berry于大约1487年出生在英国戴文貝利納波爾时，他的父亲Thomas Berry47岁，母亲Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua35岁。他和Elizabeth Bowden至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1565年7月2日在他的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在英国戴文貝利納波爾。

nameMeanings.name: Berry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Barry
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Bery
meanings: Hungarian (Béry): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Bér, in Baranya, Komárom, Nógrád, Pest, Vas, or Zala counties.

variants.name: Beery
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Béara. See Berry and O'Berry .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Bieri  .

variants.name: Berrie
meanings: (Glasgow): from Middle English or Older Scots (atte) beri ‘(at the) manor house’, see Berry .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Berry was born about 1487, in Berrynarbor, Devon, England, his father, Thomas Berry, was 47 and his mother, Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua, was 35. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Elizabeth Bowden. He died on 2 July 1565, in his hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Berrynarbor, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Berry est né environ 1487, à Berrynarbor, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Berry, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Elizabeth Bowden. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1565, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Berrynarbor, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Berry um 1487 in Berrynarbor, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Berry 47 und seine Mutter Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua 35. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Bowden mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juli 1565 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Berrynarbor, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Berry è nato il circa 1487 nel Berrynarbor, Devon, England, il suo padre, Thomas Berry, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Elizabeth Bowden. Morì il 2 luglio 1565, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Berrynarbor, Devon, England.

ja.Berrynarbor, Devon, Eng: イギリスイギリスデボンバーリナルボル
ja.Berrynarbor, Devon, England: イギリスデボンバーリナルボル
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Berryが約1487年にイギリスデボンバーリナルボルで生まれた時，父Thomas Berryは47歳，母Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiquaは35歳であった。彼はElizabeth Bowdenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1565年7月2日に故郷で79歳で死去し，イギリスデボンバーリナルボルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Berry(이)가 대략 1487년 영국 데폰 베리나르볼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Berry(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Bowden(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 7월 2일 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 베리나르볼에 묻혔다.

mn.Berrynarbor, Devon, Eng: Berrynarbor, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Berry nasceu aproximadamente 1487, em Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Berry, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Elizabeth Bowden. Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1565, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Berry родился около 1487 г. в местности бирринарбор, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Berry было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua, 35. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Elizabeth Bowden. Он умер 2 июля 1565 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности бирринарбор, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Berry nació aproximadamente 1487, en Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Berry, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Elizabeth Bowden. Murió el 2 de julio de 1565, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra.
